implementation_iterations.verdict: revise: Organization showed an execution-only Mission hint, reporting was unresolved, and configuration references read as raw ids.
pass: company context, native reporting, readable traceable configuration, linked work, activity, and responsive context are coherent.

product_truth.evidence: Native StandingAgent configuration refs, Organization membership, WorkItems and Assignments are projection-backed; no MemberRun, Wave, provider state or private thinking is invented.

visual_fidelity.evidence: Exact 1536x1024 expected/actual comparison preserves the Codex-like activity-first center, composable right context rail, warm paper palette, portrait identity and restrained card hierarchy.

intentional_deviations: The actual product keeps the global Company OS top bar and prototype truth banner rather than copying the concept shell literally.
The actual center renders only native WorkItems, Assignments, Documents and proposal records, so it is less illustratively dense than the expected image.
Configuration entries retain their raw reference below a human-readable label for auditability.
follow_ups: Connect the disabled composer only after a governed Standing Agent command transport exists.
